tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show a mildly elevated HbA1c (5.9%), indicating prediabetes, while fasting glucose is within normal limits. Renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium are all within normal ranges. Total CO₂ is slightly low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis; clinical correlation is advised. No other significant abnormalities detected.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
